title: XPS 13 vs. X1 Carbon vs. UX430

replies.msg:
其實主要文書用(excel model 之類)同埋會幾經常攞出街，所以想搵部輕身啲同埋電量ok嘅。同埋可以嘅話想部機可以玩耐啲，唔好一兩年就就已經跟唔上。

如果上邊三部都唔好，大約同等價錢請問有乜嘢更好嘅選擇

x1 carbon for sure

TBH I'm more struggling to pick either the X1 or the UX430. Would you mind to shed some light over the two?

x1 carbon for sure

TBH I'm more struggling to pick either the X1 or the UX430. Would you mind to shed some light over the two?

I got the same question as well , also MacBook Pro 13 inch is within the price range of your choices it's no longer the problem of price

x1 carbon for sure

TBH I'm more struggling to pick either the X1 or the UX430. Would you mind to shed some light over the two?

I got the same question as well , also MacBook Pro 13 inch is within the price range of your choices it's no longer the problem of price

I try to avoid MacBook as they moved the short keys on office everywhere and I think it's kind of silly to use boot camp where you can just get a normal laptop. X1 is more durable but I guess function wise UX430 seems to be a better choice. The price difference is only 1k so price is not a decisive factor here. Or I can just use the office laptop but it's just way too heavy...
用咗XPS二年，主要旅行時用，滿意built quality同輕便，估其他二部功能上都係差唔多。反而覺得touch screen mon會幾方便，尤其係唔方便用mouse嘅空間，例如飛機同車上，心思思想換部xps13有touch screen mon嘅又可以做tablet。 建議諗諗呢樣嘢。

XPS 13 QC唔係好得又有coil whine，硬件比UX430好一啲，但散熱非常差，喇叭又唔靚聲
UX430個keyboard好打好多，散熱算唔錯，亦都多好多功能，雖然都係gimmick嘢實際冇乜用，喇叭啲聲唔錯
